description: Quality Gate system — 7 automated checks that validate LLM output quality before handoff

architecture.integration: PTG-C5: Quality Gate — runs after PTG-C1 through C4, before handoff.js allows commit

checks.name: Hallucination Detector
checks.severity: BLOCK on secrets, WARN on TODO

checks.name: Test Gate
checks.severity: WARN on missing, BLOCK on failures

checks.name: Dependency Sanity
checks.severity: BLOCK on missing, WARN on monorepo

qualityGates.name: Hallucination
qualityGates.criteria: Script catches MISSING_API_DATA in non-test files

qualityGates.name: Contract Compliance
qualityGates.criteria: Script warns when endpoint doesn't match contract

qualityGates.name: Test Gate
qualityGates.criteria: npm test is run when test files change

qualityGates.name: Plan Diff
qualityGates.criteria: Files in plan but not changed are warned

qualityGates.name: Dependencies
qualityGates.criteria: Missing packages in package.json are blocked
